channel.title: Theses on Marco Montanari · ingmmo.com
channel.description: Recent content in Theses on Marco Montanari · ingmmo.com

item.title: The Lever, Not the Engine
item.description: For thirty years, “integration” meant pain. If two systems needed to talk, somebody had to sit down, read two sets of documentation, agree on a schema, write an adapter, and maintain it forever. Every connection was a project. Every project had a cost. And because connections were expensive, the rational move — for any company that wanted to keep you — was to build a wall around its data and make leaving more expensive than staying.
